title: euphorbia platyrrhiza
intro: Euphorbia platyrrhiza, also known as the iron-plated spurge or desert iron-plaster plant, is a succulent plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Euphorbia platyrrhiza include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Euphorbia platyrrhiza can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, which are often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall health.
